title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
